info.name: Attendify - Doctor API
info.description: Doctor workspace endpoints for Attendify. A doctor account may also carry administrative access through `administrative_access=true`, which means the same authenticated user can access both the doctor and administrative workspaces. This is now the official path for new administrative access. Check `administrative_access` and `available_workspaces` in auth responses to know whether the current account is doctor only or doctor plus administrative.

item.name: Section 1
item.description: English documentation placeholder for this section in the Attendify - Doctor API collection.

request.description: Authenticate a doctor account. If the authenticated user also has `administrative_access=true`, the same account can use both the doctor and administrative collections, and `available_workspaces` should include both doctor and administrative.
English documentation placeholder for this item in the Attendify - Doctor API collection.

Return the current doctor profile and workspace flags. Use this request to confirm whether the account is doctor only or doctor plus administrative by checking `administrative_access` and `available_workspaces`.
Change the doctor account password.
Returns all subjects taught by the doctor with their current inquiry open/closed status and the optional closed reason.
Toggle inquiry availability for one subject taught by the doctor. Set inquiries_enabled to true to open or false to close.
Preferred excuse review request. When status=accepted, send resolution=excused_permission, excused_exemption, or keep_absent.

English documentation placeholder for this item in the Attendify - Doctor API collection.
List grade categories for a subject.
Create a new grade category.
Delete a grade category if it has no grades.

Load the delegation dashboard for one subject. Important: delegation works per grade category, not for the whole subject. If no categories exist yet, the doctor must first create grade categories before delegation can be used.

Assign one grade category to an eligible student or delegate. The selected user will then see this task in their authorized grade tasks section and can enter scores for it. Submitted scores stay pending until doctor approval.
Remove delegation for one grade category from a previously authorized user. After revocation, the user should no longer use that category for new score entry.
List pending delegated grades awaiting approval.
Approve or reject delegated grades in bulk.

item.name: Section 15
item.description: Clinical case assignments. Doctors can create assignments, filter them by student/task/status, and review submitted completion messages from students.

request.description: List clinical assignments created by the current doctor. Supports filtering by student_id, clinical_case_id, task_type, and workflow status.
Create a new clinical task for a student. New assignments start with status `assigned`.
Approve or reject a submitted assignment. When `action` is `reject`, `review_notes` is required and will be shown to the student as the rejection reason.

item.name: Section 16
item.description: Clinical daily log QR review. Doctors can scan a student's QR token, review grouped sections, confirm selected sections with per-section diagnosis, or reject the whole log.

request.description: Scan a student's clinical QR token and receive grouped log sections (`history`, `exam`, `round`) with confirmation state, diagnosis, and item labels.
Confirm selected sections of a daily log or reject it completely. Section diagnosis is optional and applied per section, not per individual item.
List all clinical daily logs. Use the status filter to monitor pending, partially confirmed, fully confirmed, or rejected logs.
English documentation placeholder for this item in the Attendify - Doctor API collection.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Doctor attendance management API.

request.description: List attendance sessions for the doctor.
Load subject, students, and prefill data for attendance entry. Supports gender_filter=all|male|female and returns merge-mode guidance.

Stores attendance for an official or special lecture. lecture_type accepts official|special, gender_filter accepts all|male|female, and re-saving the same lecture merges instead of wiping prior student rows.
Enable or disable delegate attendance capture for a subject.
Returns the attendance report for one date and optionally one lecture_id. The payload now includes lecture_type, attendance_method, recorded_by_name, and recorded_by_role.
Directly edit one attendance record from the doctor side. Allowed values are present, absent, late, permitted, and exempted.

item.name: News
item.description: Doctor news center API. This feed shows broadcast batches that were actually delivered to the current doctor account, including college administration announcements, exams, assignments, attendance alerts, and polls.

request.description: List broadcast news batches delivered to the current doctor. This is a news-center feed, not the full personal notifications inbox.
Show one delivered news batch by `batch_id` and mark it as read.
Vote on a poll-type news batch using its `batch_id`.

item.name: Ledger
item.description: Doctor financial ledger API.

request.description: Get the doctor ledger and balance.
Get the export URL for the ledger PDF.

item.name: Subscription
item.description: Doctor subscription and wallet API.

request.description: Get subscription status and packages.
Redeem a voucher card.
Subscribe to a package.
Toggle auto renewal for the subscription.

item.name: Cards Generate
item.description: Doctor card generation API.

request.description: List generated cards and current balance.
Generate recharge cards.

item.name: Library
item.description: Doctor shared library API.

request.description: List shared library resources visible to the doctor.
Upload a new shared library resource.
Get the download URL and increment downloads count.

item.name: Doctor Announcements
item.description: Doctor announcement management API.

request.description: List doctor announcements.
Create a doctor announcement.
Show one doctor announcement.
Update a doctor announcement.

body.raw:
{
    "subject_id":  "{{subject_id}}",
    "type":  "announcement",
    "title":  "Updated Exam Reminder",
    "content":  "The exam hall has changed.",
    "published_at":  "2026-04-01 12:00:00"
}

request.description: Delete a doctor announcement.

Update results visibility.
Delete a quiz.
